Complete and good service.

reviews.comment:
Los baños son muy limpios. Teniendo en cuenta su ubicación venden varios productos aparte de los combustibles.
Hay abundante sombra para dejar vehículos debajo de los árboles.
Tiene un entorno muy natural, con pastizales y caballos.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are very clean. Considering its location, they sell several products besides fuel.
There's plenty of shade under the trees for parking.
It has a very natural setting, with grasslands and horses.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneHF2bmlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Al pasar la ruta nueva queda fuera del paso. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Once you pass the new route, you're out of the way. Good service.

reviews.comment:

ACA style. Excellent service. Spotless restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Cuando estuve no pudieron cargarme nafta porque estaban sin luz hacia ya una semana.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. When I was there, they couldn't fill up my gas because they'd been without power for a week.

reviews.comment:
